backend._comment: Optional owner-side backend. If set, CashCrab can pull app credentials from your backend.

llm._comment: Recommended: qwen_code + qwen-oauth via `cashcrab auth qwen`. Also works: g4f, ollama, openai, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

engage._comment: Engagement autopilot settings. Keywords drive search & engage + thought leader agent.

twitter._comment: Get client_id from developer.twitter.com -> OAuth 2.0 settings. bearer_token is optional but improves read rate limits.

notifications._comment: Optional. You can also save these inside CashCrab -> Setup -> Save keys and webhooks.
